name: @umituz/polar-billing
description: Universal Polar.sh subscription billing — Supabase & Firebase adapters

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --clean --external firebase --external firebase/functions --external firebase/firestore --external @supabase/supabase-js
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --watch --external firebase --external firebase/functions --external firebase/firestore --external @supabase/supabase-js

author: Antigravity
